title: Chickens Hatch Now
description: Ever thought throwing eggs to hatch chickens was stupid?
body:
Ever thought throwing eggs to hatch chickens was stupid? Well hey, that's why this mod exists!

How does it work?  Plonk down a chicken egg (upto 4) on top of a hay block! In about 9 minutes, a baby chicken will hatch!

<hr>

Config options:
- Time taken to update hatching progress in seconds (default: 180)
- Disable chickens spawning from thrown eggs (default: true)

<hr>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/7bsJeQpxSeA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![GIF showing chickens hatching from egg blocks](https://i.imgur.com/lduKQDn.gif)
